data.title: Write structural boundary tests for WORKTREE_TRACKING :complete/:landed instruction files
data.description:
## Story
d2ef-92cc — WORKTREE_TRACKING :complete and :landed

## testing_mode
RED

## What
Create new test file `tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-complete-landed.sh` with structural boundary tests for:
1. `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md` — has :complete write in failure path section (Step 6)
2. `plugins/dso/skills/end-session/SKILL.md` — has :landed write in Step 4 after merge-to-main.sh

## Tests to write (RED — files not yet modified)
- test_per_worktree_review_commit_has_complete_section: grep for 'WORKTREE_TRACKING:complete' in per-worktree-review-commit.md
- test_per_worktree_review_commit_complete_in_failure_path: grep for ':complete' after 'failure' or 'conflict' heading
- test_end_session_has_landed_section: grep for 'WORKTREE_TRACKING:landed' in end-session/SKILL.md
- test_end_session_landed_after_merge: grep for ':landed' after 'merge-to-main' reference

## .test-index entries to add
```
plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/per-worktree-review-commit.md tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-complete-landed.sh
plugins/dso/skills/end-session/SKILL.md tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-complete-landed.sh
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New test file exists at tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-complete-landed.sh and is executable
- [ ] All 4 tests run and fail RED (source files not yet modified)
- [ ] .test-index has entries for both per-worktree-review-commit.md and end-session/SKILL.md pointing to this test file
- [ ] Tests use grep-based structural boundary pattern (not content-coupled assertions)
